mapper.select: select pbarcode from t_scm_pallet where bbarcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
mapper.update: update t_wms_location set qty = #{pqty}, useyn = 'N', MEMO_D = #{dmemo}, ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where barcode = #{pbarcode} and useyn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_location (sdate, ymdhms,location, barcode, itemcode, qty, loginid, factory,storage,rack,module,levelcode,position,source,memo2) select #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), location, #{barcode}, itemcode,#{qty},#{loginid},factory,storage,rack,module,levelcode,position,source,#{memo} from t_wms_location where barcode = #{pbarcode} and useyn = 'Y' and rownum = 1
mapper.update: update t_wms_worklocation set qty = #{pqty}, useyn = 'N', MEMO_D = #{dmemo}, ymdhms_d = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where barcode = #{pbarcode} and useyn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_worklocation (indate, ymdhms,location, barcode, itemcode, qty, loginid, factory,storage,rack,module,levelcode,position,source,memo2) select #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), location, #{barcode}, itemcode,#{qty},#{loginid},factory,storage,rack,module,levelcode,position,source,#{memo} from t_wms_worklocation where barcode = #{pbarcode} and useyn = 'Y' and rownum = 1
